fault_hypothesis: The code on line 66 incorrectly removes an element from the merged list when the last elements of both input lists are identical. This violates the expectation that a merge operation should preserve all elements, resulting in a list that is one element too short.

constraints.intent: The total number of elements must be preserved after the pop operation.
After the main merge loops, the merged list must contain all elements.
The element count must be preserved even when handling shared tail elements.
The final returned list must contain the sum of elements from both inputs.
